metadata.reference: D. I. Yakubovsky, Y. V. Stebunov, R. V. Kirtaev, G. A. Ermolaev, M. S. Mironov, S. M. Novikov, A. V. Arsenin, V. S. Volkov. Ultrathin and ultrasmooth gold films on monolayer MoS2. Adv. Mater. Interfaces 6, 1900196 (2019) (Numerical data kindly provided by Georgy Ermolaev)
metadata.comments: Au thickness = 4.1 nm, e-beam evaporated at 5 Å/s with a base pressure of 5e-7 Torr on MoS<sub>2</sub> CVD monolayer on SiO<sub>2</sub> substrate at T = 20 °C. Thickness was determined by AFM.
